title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's totally gonna win today! She's
top-class when it comes to sprints!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
No way! My money's on that newcomer, Daitaku
Helios! She'll set Nakayama ablaze for sure!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo... I'm here to witness the very moment
you triumph and reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna put everything you've taught me into
this race! I'll pull out all the stops and carve my
name into Nakayama!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe! Just feel that energy in the air! This race is
about to be a blast!)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey, Bamboo! ☆ Your vibes've got me
going, like, whaaaaat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Helios! As always, you've got me asking "what?"
as well!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Daitaku Helios is always bouncing off the walls
and saying things I don't understand, but her
racing ability is nothing to sneeze at!)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: You won't believe how ready I am for today! Like, I am locked in! I just know it's gonna be total gas! Can I get a "wahey"?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm assume that means you're excited for the race.
That's great, but just so you know...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to take my place at the top. That means
crushing everyone here, including you! You better
be ready!
